shortDescription: 7,000+ casino games (slots, live dealer, table games, jackpots) from 100+ software providers including Pragmatic Play, NetEnt, Evolution, Play'n GO. Dual-licensed under Curaçao Gaming Authority and Anjouan Gaming Board (Comoros), operated by Rabidi N.V.
payoutTimes: E-wallets and crypto typically process within 0-24 hours to 3 banking days depending on method; bank transfers and card payments take roughly 3-7 days. Withdrawal requests are processed by the finance team Monday-Friday, 6am-5pm, generally within 3 business days once verification is complete. Players may hold up to 3 pending withdrawals at a time.
license: Curaçao Gaming Authority — Curaçao eGaming licence (Antillephone N.V. master licence No. 8048/JAZ), operated by Rabidi N.V.; Anjouan Gaming Board — Government of the Autonomous Island of Anjouan, Union of Comoros (dual/secondary licence held alongside Curaçao)
